title: Multi Weaponry
description: Weapon catalogue-expanding mod that adds thirty-five new weapons into minecraft and mobs for the player to have a better experience.
body:
###  -Multi Weaponry-
(My first mod after a year!)

https://youtu.be/7LzzjQLAT_g
thirty five new weapons, 2 trowable objects and 2 & 1/4 sets of armor into the game, including:

![All the weapons of the mod in an inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c47bdb878b4263072fc168bb2378429fc89b7ea7.png)

Bronze and tin swords, double swords of vanilla materials, Talwar (Godly sword), Sai and khanjars, Bagh Nakh and it's disguises, the aztec Macuahitl, a staff, pike, and spears.

The mod also adds three new mobs: The Expert Weaponer, Soilders, Ghosts, the wall yokai Nurikabe. Along with new bosses like Centurion, found in the new ruins structure, found in any type of plains and forest, normally 200 blocks away from spawn.

![The structure's insides and both the soilders and Centurion in a snowy plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eebc4aa41f3bb3d18df8ad2727669849f198c300.png)

TW: The talwar has a 20% chance of throwing a ligthing which produces a mix of 5 animal death sounds, this may be a jumpscare for some people so... embrace your ears and dont wear headphones
